name: The Space Scouts
description:
Welcome to your new life as a Space Scout! Your new job is simple, your familiar will find an alien invader, then you have to fuck it till it passes out! Afterwards it is teleported away and boom! You've saved the day!

Of course some aliens are a bit... rough, but you can handle it right! What's the worse that could happen? Get turned into a living dildo or hypnotized by extraterrestrial spores?

Of course it isn't all work and no play. After your done you get to go to your base that's inside the moon! There you have access to all the aftercare you could possibly imagine. When your rested you get to do it all over again!

It isn't explicitly stated in the intro, but feel free to mention that your gender had been changed if you want some optional kinky gender bender shenanigans mixed in as it works lore-wise with the bot! But don't forget to add that info into the Memory Box!

Amazing Artist for the cover Image: https://x.com/tohirokonno?t=HtTrW6m4Tx9yQIgMCGTn8g&s=09

I mentioned this in my last bot, but I've been in a burnout recently, however I'm starting to feel better now! Thank you for all the support!
creator: Mason8tor
